DIRECTIVE 11 SEED REPLAY (run 234's seed). Baseline died F31 to Snake Plant at 17/80: no healing card, 4 clumping Defends, attack-heavy deck, skipped Corruption at the Hexaghost reward ('trap without FNP'). EXPERIMENT: take Corruption when offered, weight block/skill density per the updated drafting checklist, complete what exhaust package the seed allows (FNP never appeared on baseline route), and measure (a) whether Corruption-without-FNP turns are net energy-positive, (b) Snake Plant fight cost with the engine vs baseline's death. Same route as baseline both acts to hold fights/offers constant. WIN%: 55% (baseline A9 start).

FIGHT STRATEGY - Hexaghost (A9 boss, ~264 HP). TYPE: Boss - spend HP for kill speed. WIN CON: Cultist Potion T1 (Ritual ramp, baseline killed it T8 at Str 15 this way) + Spot Weakness on attack turns + Strike Dummy strikes. ZERO PLAN: T1 free (setup: Cultist Potion + Evolve/Barricade if drawn). T2 Divider = floor(68/12)+1 x6 = 36 - MUST block ~. Shockwave+ (Weak 5) saved for first Inferno (~30). Burns: Evolve draws through them; block over-covers by 2/Burn in hand. KEY CARDS: Cultist Potion, Evolve, Shockwave+, Spot Weakness, Shrug/Defends. POTIONS: Cultist T1, Block Potion on Inferno/Divider gap. RISKS: Burns death spiral past T10; under-blocking Divider at 68 HP. WIN%: 60% (=)

ACT 2 ROUTE (baseline's, held constant for the experiment): x2 Monster -> Unknown -> Shop -> Monster -> Shop -> ELITE Book of Stabbing (F22) -> Rest -> Monster = CENTURION+MYSTIC (F24, the fight that broke the baseline at 10x3 Fury) -> Treasure -> Unknown -> Rest -> Monster -> Unknown -> Monster = SNAKE PLANT (F31, the directive's measured fight) -> Rest -> Collector. Corruption rules of engagement: in hallway fights play it when (a) 4E available via Collar/free turn, or (b) fight projects 4+ turns AND Skills-in-deck >= remaining block turns; count energy-saved vs skills-lost per fight. EXPERIMENT - Spheric Guardian (the 'guaranteed attrition loss without an engine' fight, expected cost 30-50): killed T7, net cost 42 (69->27). Mid-range of expected, vs a baseline deck that never had to fight it. Corruption-without-FNP ledger this fight: T5-T6 played EIGHT skills for 0E (Shockwave, Sentinel(+2E!), Defend, Armaments+, 3x Defend+, Shrug+) = ~9E saved, 23 block one turn + 18 banked via Barricade; skills lost to exhaust never mattered (fight ended before deck thinned). Sentinel under Corruption = free block + 2 ENERGY. EVIDENCE: net positive WITHOUT FNP in a 7-turn fight; Barricade substitutes for FNP as the block accumulator. CONFOUNDER: Frail 5 ate ~25% of all block - true cost without it ~30.

POST-MORTEM while alive: fight was lost to (1) an eaten turn-2 - command lag discarded 5 cards unplayed, 12 HP, (2) name-resolution playing Evolve instead of Hemokinesis T1 - Mystic reached its heal threshold un-bursted, (3) my own 4E plan on a 3E turn (T4).
